examples.title: Simple TCP Server
examples.description: Basic TCP echo server that receives message and returns it
examples.explanation: Server creates ServerSocket on port 8888, waits for accept(). When client connects, reads message, echoes it back, and closes connections.

examples.title: Simple TCP Client
examples.description: Client that connects to server and sends a message
examples.explanation: Client creates Socket connection to server IP and port, sends message via PrintWriter, receives response via BufferedReader, and closes connection.

examples.title: UDP Server
examples.description: UDP echo server that receives datagrams and responds
examples.explanation: UDP server uses DatagramSocket. Receives DatagramPacket containing client address/port, processes it, sends response to same client address.

examples.title: Concurrent TCP Server
examples.description: Multi-threaded server handling multiple clients simultaneously
examples.explanation: Server accepts connections and spawns a new ClientHandler thread for each client. Each thread handles its client independently, allowing concurrent connections.

examples.title: Socket API Sequence - TCP Server
examples.description: Pseudocode showing socket API call sequence for TCP server
examples.explanation: Shows the standard TCP server flow: socket() creates socket, bind() attaches to port, listen() enables accepting connections, accept() gets client socket, process and close.
